---
title: "Vermal Cerebellum Differences between 3T and 7T fMRI within Subclinical Anxiety and Healthy Adults"
presenter: Zachary Brodnick
pres_group: presentations
date: '2026-05-01'
event: SOBP 2026
description: "Zachary Brodnick, Grace Hodges, Jessica A. Turner"
image: presentation.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](presentation.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}


![](zachpresentsobp.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
